title: Shared Sources, Tenant Subscriptions, State Machines, and Races · Type Forensics
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in idempotent shared-source subscription service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Register an approved discovered source idempotently from identity, provenance, parser evidence, and current policy.
Create and remove tenant-scoped follows without deleting shared source history and expose explicit desired-state semantics.
Model pending, active, paused, moved, failing, disabled, deleted, and appealed transitions with actors and causes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Source Registration
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 9434 during a cross-tenant privacy and cache audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile shared sources, tenant subscriptions, lifecycle transitions, authorization, and registration races; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Register an approved discovered source idempotently from identity, provenance, parser evidence, and current policy.

Inspect the Feed Ts Source Registration trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Source Registration.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for register an approved discovered source idempotently from identity, provenance, parser evidence, and current policy. steps.instruction:
